title: Subitems reflected on calendar?
excerpt: Any news on when or if we will be able to view subitems on the calendar or gantt view? Would also be very helpful to be able to mirror subitems on another board. I’m repeatedly making new boards simply so that the dates …

posts.author: adoniskitchenbath (Sean Jones)
posts.cookedHtml: Any news on when or if we will be able to view subitems on the calendar or gantt view? Would also be very helpful to be able to mirror subitems on another board. I’m repeatedly making new boards simply so that the dates on the subitems can be viewed on the calendar.

posts.author: jeldredge (Jacqueline)
posts.cookedHtml: We seem to see the board name on the calendar with no subitem info, but I agree this is a necessary feature.
